task: Prove upstream import/build tooling and submodule path
acceptance_criteria: Upstream source can be imported with submodules; build prerequisites are known or resolved; exact blockers recorded if build cannot run.

task: Import upstream source unchanged except identity scaffolding
acceptance_criteria: Bottom keyboard source starts from Unexpected Keyboard; package/app identity becomes FrankenKey; baseline files are not refactored beyond required identity/build changes.
Executable proof covers label generation and group boundaries for 0,1,7,8,14,15 snippets.
Local-only snippet slots persist order, phrase, label/icon, icon flag; no network/account path is introduced.
Proof demonstrates the row can sit above the keyboard without changing Keyboard2View touch/key behavior.
Enabled snippet row shows seven slots per group and scrolls/swipes horizontally between groups.
Proof verifies commitText receives exactly the configured phrase with cursor position 1 and no appended space.
Tapping a configured snippet inserts exact phrase and leaves keyboard open; empty slot behavior is safe.
Settings UI supports fixed slots, phrase entry, auto label preview, optional icon-style labels, clear/edit empty slots.

task: Prove app identity and debug APK metadata
acceptance_criteria: Manifest/method metadata, package id, app label, and debug signing produce a distinct FrankenKey debug APK.
Normal key entry, modifiers, gestures, settings, and layout remain Unexpected Keyboard behavior.
Editor, persistence, seven-slot grouping, horizontal group navigation, and insertion behavior meet PRD criteria.
Debug APK builds; install/IME smoke succeeds if SDK/device/emulator prerequisites are available, otherwise exact blocker is recorded.
All acceptance criteria have evidence; no unresolved high/medium findings; signoff status recorded.
